headline: How The Charles Schwab (SCHW) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Capital Returns
summary: Charles Schwab’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly lower to about US$120.68 from US$121.00, a move of less than 1% that keeps the core valuation view largely intact. This tweak sits against a backdrop of broadly constructive Street research, where many analysts are lifting price targets into the US$114 to US$123 range while still flagging sector and macro risks. As you read on, you will see how these mixed signals shape the evolving narrative around Schwab and what to watch as...
